Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Two Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
Dale Chen, Esq. for Petitioner: Yoon-Leong Lin, present as Guardian at litem for: Hubert Lin and Winford Lin, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise of $1,500.00 as to Hubert Lin and $750.00 as to Winford Lin.
Each settlement proceeds to be depositted into a blocked account with Vanguard 500 Fund, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders signed in open court.
